book: Use Claude to Build an AI Trading Bot — 90 Days with Stocks, Options, and Prediction Markets

manuscript_snapshot.note: Content hash of the chapters this repo mirrors. If your printing differs from an entry below, check the 'status' field: the book was revised, and this repo tracks the revised text.

status_legend.resolved_in_book: The current manuscript does the correct thing. The repo matches it. Earlier printings had the bug; kept here as a historical note.
status_legend.still_current: The current manuscript still carries this. The repo implements the honest version and says so.
status_legend.repo_intentional_improvement: The repo deliberately does something the book does not, for a stated reason. Not a book bug.
status_legend.not_a_bug: Looks like a bug, is not. Do not 'fix' it.

deviations.title: Monte Carlo dispersion (random.sample vs random.choices)
deviations.note: 2nd ed samples WITH replacement (ch06.md:205, random.choices) and explains the permutation trap in prose (ch06.md:611). Repo matches. Earlier printings used random.sample and reported zero dispersion.

deviations.title: check_exits() covers a short instead of doubling it
deviations.note: 2nd ed covers shorts side-agnostically, moves the stop to breakeven after scale-out, and adds the 5-day time limit (ch05.md:500-550). Repo matches. Earlier printings submitted OrderSide.SELL unconditionally.

deviations.title: Sector concentration ignores the proposed position
deviations.note: check_sector_concentration() sums only existing positions; the chapter's own check_correlation() includes the proposed trade. Repo uses proposed + existing.

deviations.title: Rule 4 promises REDUCE; the code only BLOCKS
deviations.note: remaining_capacity is computed, returned as a formatted string, never read. Repo ships the REDUCE path and a REDUCED verdict.

deviations.title: evaluate_trade() has no stop_loss_pct parameter
deviations.note: The chapter's own 'widen TSLA to 5%' advice is unreachable through the sanctioned gatekeeper. Repo threads the parameter.

deviations.title: suggested_bet is a three-way contradiction
deviations.note: Code, prose, and the two worked examples disagree. Repo ships the code as printed (the only formula that reproduces any printed output) with the erratum stated.

deviations.title: profit_factor: unformatted, and two formulas under one name
deviations.note: avg-based in ch06 (Kelly consumes it), sum-based in ch10's gate + Appendix D. Repo keeps both under distinct names (profit_factor, gross_profit_factor).

deviations.title: MIN_VOLUME is a dead constant
deviations.note: Declared, never referenced. Repo implements the liquidity filter.

deviations.title: Chapter 3's three rules exist in no code
deviations.note: ADV floor, geopolitical penalty, Tier1/Tier2 conflict penalty. Repo implements all three in utils/signals.py, default-ON.

deviations.title: Multi-agent JSON parsers can return None, unguarded
deviations.note: ch04/05/07 guard it; ch08 does not. Repo adds the guard.

deviations.title: Minimum trades: 30 in code, 100 in Appendix B
deviations.note: Worked example wins: 30 is the hard gate, 100 the recommended floor.

deviations.title: The 'last 5 minutes' poll window is prose-only
deviations.note: No time-window param in the printed get_live_flow(). Repo adds newer_than.

deviations.title: ch06's Sharpe of 1.24 is not reachable from its own stats
deviations.note: sqrt(252) annualizes per-trade 5-day returns (wrong in kind). Repo transcribes the formula exactly as printed because ch09/ch10 consume it; read it as a relative score.

deviations.title: ch11 mis-cites bracket orders to 'Chapter 9'
deviations.note: Bracket orders live in ch08's Executor. Repo docs cite ch08. No code impact.

deviations.title: Two prose-arithmetic errata with no code path
deviations.note: ch06.md:18 '21% chance of 12+ heads in 16 flips' is 3.84%; ch10's $50K upper band. Report-only; the repo computes neither.

deviations.title: MAX_POSITION_PCT vs MAX_RISK_PER_TRADE
deviations.note: 2% notional vs 2% risk — different quantities sharing a numeral. The book reconciles them deliberately. Both ship, un-unified.
